title: Spider-Man 2
subTitle: After losing his job, lover and his powers, Peter Parker feels dissatisfied with his life. Soon, amidst all this chaos, he also has to fight Doctor Octavius who poses a threat to the New York.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear chops his way into petrified swamps devastated by the 2004 tsunami and must navigate his way out, facing deadly lizards, snakes, waterfalls and steep cliffs.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Adventurer Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive in Ecuador's jungles by building bamboo bridges, making a bow and arrow, and showing which plants are poisonous.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls shows survival techniques in Namibia's harsh desert environment. He demonstrates how to endure one of Earth's hottest and most desolate regions.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls demonstrates all the techniques and skills that are required in order to stay alive in the dangerous waters of the Everglades.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Survivalist Bear Grylls treks across the Siberian tundra and into the Sayan Mountains, demonstrating a wide range of survival skills.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Bear Grylls travels across Kenya to demonstrate how to survive the African savannah.

title: Married to Evil
subTitle: Jessica Jaramillio flees her abusive husband Chad Graves, but joint custody of her children means he will be present in their lives. Soon, his obsessive nature reveals his true hidden character.

title: Jackie Chan's First Strike
subTitle: Tasked with a covert mission, Chan Ka-Kui hunts down an arms dealer, facing deadly traps, high-speed chases and gravity-defying stunts in his pursuit of justice.

title: Evil Dead
subTitle: Five friends decide to spend a weekend in a remote cabin located deep in the forest. When they accidentally summon a dormant demon, they strive to survive its evil ploys.

title: Poseidon
subTitle: On New Year's Eve, the luxury ocean liner Poseidon capsizes after being swamped by a rogue wave. Later, the survivors are left to fight for their lives as they attempt to escape the sinking ship.

title: Suicide Squad
subTitle: Amanda Waller assembles a team of imprisoned criminals and supervillains. Later, when an ancient witch threatens humanity, the squad is tasked with defeating her.

title: Django Unchained
subTitle: When Django, a slave, is freed, he joins forces with a bounty hunter to rescue his wife, who has been enslaved by Calvin, a hard-hearted plantation owner.

subTitle: When an experiment goes wrong, a genetically enhanced anaconda offspring is unleashed. Possessing the power to regenerate, it quickly creates panic and destruction.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: In the vastness of the Sahara desert and the terrifying beauty of towering sand dunes, Bear Grylls tackles extreme survival challenges as he consumes one of the world's deadliest scorpions to survive.

title: Man vs. Wild
subTitle: Adventurer Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive in the harsh Australian outback by taking extreme measures to avoid sun stroke, finding food, and avoiding the deadly salt water crocodiles.

subTitle: Bear Grylls ventures into Zambia's wilderness for a survival challenge. He faces and overcomes some of the world's most powerful river rapids.

subTitle: Stacy Malman and Robert Feldman's dreamy love story soon becomes a nightmare. However, on a horrible night, a knock at their door forever changes the couple's lives.

subTitle: Bear Grylls draws upon all his experience as a survivor to tackle the dangers of the Costa Rican rainforest, climbing 100 ft trees and down 120 ft waterfalls, facing snakes and sweltering humidity.
